description_long: This is a large, cylindrical blue barrel with a slightly textured surface and two horizontal reinforcement rings encircling its body. The barrel features a black, tightly sealed lid with two small, round screw caps on top, likely for controlled access or venting. The surface appears to be made of durable plastic, suitable for outdoor or industrial use. One side of the barrel displays a yellow and black radioactive warning symbol above a red caution label, indicating it may be used for hazardous material storage. The overall construction suggests it is designed to be watertight and robust, capable of withstanding rough handling. Its size and markings make it a prominent object in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large blue plastic barrel with a black lid, textured surface, and radioactive warning label, designed for secure storage in urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: The blue barrel is shown with its black lid and two small caps visible, no labels or markings are present on this side.
description_view_1: This view is similar to view 0, showing the lid and caps, with no visible labels or markings.
description_view_2: This side of the barrel displays a yellow radioactive warning symbol and a red caution label, making it the most informative view.
description_view_3: The barrel is shown from another plain side, with the lid and caps visible but no labels or markings.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: radioactive warning symbol, red caution label
